title: cordia schottiana
intro: Cordia schottiana, also known as the Bhatki or Wild Pear, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cordia schottiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments.
